title: Type definitions for vibe task graph execution
purpose: Defines the interface types for task batches and individual tasks used in vibe workflow execution.
module_context: Exports two interface type definitions: TaskBatch for batch execution phases and BatchTask for individual tasks within those batches.

steps.content: Define the structure for a task batch including its unique identifier.
Specify the collection of tasks contained within this batch.
Establish the status of the batch with possible values of pending, in_progress, or completed.
Define the structure for an individual task within a batch.
Include the unique identifier for this task.
Set the status of the task with possible values of pending, in_progress, completed, or failed.
Specify the list of task identifiers that this task depends on.
